query:
SELECT 
  c.enrichmentSource,
  c.enrichmentStatus,
  c.emailVerified,
  CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL THEN 'has_email' ELSE 'no_email' END as email_status,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.name = c.project
WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY c.enrichmentSource, c.enrichmentStatus, c.emailVerified, email_status
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
